---
title: "Picrust"
author: "IY"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r library, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(ggpicrust2)
```
# Picrust Analysis of MetaCyc
This pipeline will be a complex analysis of the Picrust output we did on the class server.

## Input and Convert the Needed Files

Input and convert the ```phyloseq_taxonomy.rds``` sample data into a data frame and move the ```fastq``` sample IDs into a column. Then import the ```path_abun_unstrat.tsv``` file.

```{r Import Data}
meta = readRDS('../datasets/ps_filtered.rds') %>% .@sam_data %>% data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column('sample_name')

metacyc = read_delim('path_abun_unstrat.tsv')
```


## Run the Pipeline

```{r DAA}

# 1. Subset metadata to hindgut only
hindgut <- meta %>% filter(sample_type == "hindgut")

# 2. Keep only hindgut samples that actually exist in MetaCyc
valid_samples <- intersect(hindgut$sample_name, colnames(metacyc))

# 3. Filter MetaCyc to those samples
metacyc_filt <- metacyc %>%
  column_to_rownames("pathway") %>%
  select(all_of(valid_samples))

# 4. Also update hindgut metadata to match
hindgut <- hindgut %>% filter(sample_name %in% valid_samples)

#draft-- Filter to only compare hindgut microbiome
hindgut = meta %>% filter(sample_type %in% c('hindgut'))
metacyc_filt = metacyc %>% select(all_of(hindgut$sample_name))

metacyc_filt <- metacyc %>%
  column_to_rownames("pathway") %>%      
  select(all_of(meta$sample_name))       

# Perform pathway differential abundance analysis (DAA) using LinDA method
daa_results_df = pathway_daa(abundance = metacyc_filt,
                             metadata = hindgut, 
                             group = "swim_performance", 
                             daa_method = "LinDA", 
                             select = NULL, reference = NULL)

saveRDS(daa_results_df, 'meta_fish_daa_results_df.rds')
```

## Convert to MetaCyc

```{r}
# Annotate pathway results using MetaCyc

daa_annotated_results_df = pathway_annotation(pathway = "MetaCyc",
                                              daa_results_df = daa_results_df,
                                              ko_to_kegg = FALSE)

saveRDS(daa_annotated_results_df,'fish_daa_annotated_results_df.rds')

#daa_annotated_results_df<-readRDS(daa_annotated_results_df,'fish_daa_annotated_results_df.rds')
```


## MetaCyc Error Barplot 
```{r Plot}
source("ggpicrust2_errorbar_function_fixed.R")

peb <- pathway_errorbar_fixed(
  abundance = metacyc_filt,
  daa_results_df = daa_annotated_results_df,
  Group = hindgut$swim_performance,
  wrap_label = TRUE,
  wraplength = 60,
  fc_cutoff = 1,              
  p_values_threshold = 0.05,  
  order_by_log = FALSE,
  order = "pathway_class",
  ko_to_kegg = FALSE,
  p_value_bar = TRUE,
  x_lab = "pathway_name"
)

peb

ggsave("MetaCyc_Error_Bar.png",
       plot = peb, width = 18, height = 10)


```
## MetaCyc Heatmap

```{r MetaCyc heatmap plot}
# Compute relative abundance
metacyc_relab <- metacyc_filt %>%
  apply(2, function(x) x / sum(x)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Compute variance across samples
var_df <- metacyc_relab %>%
  mutate(var = apply(., 1, var)) %>%
  arrange(desc(var)) %>%
  slice(1:30) %>%
  select(-var)

# Correlation matrix
stats <- var_df %>%
  t() %>%
  cor(method = "pearson")

# Heatmap
color_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("#5E3C99", "white", "#F28E2B"))(40)
breaks <- seq(-1, 1, length.out = 41)

pheatmap(
  stats,
  clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
  clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
  clustering_method = "complete",
  color = color_palette,
  breaks = breaks,
  fontsize_row = 10,
  fontsize_col = 10,
  filename = "MetaCyc_Heatmap.png",
  height = 9,
  width = 9
)



```
## View Identical Features - doesn't work with MetaCyc 

```{r Identical Features}
sig_features = daa_annotated_results_df %>% 
  filter(p_adjust < 5e-11, abs(log2FoldChange) > 5) %>% 
  pull('feature') %>% unique()

meta_relab = read.delim('path_abun_unstrat.tsv',row.names = 1) %>% 
  apply(2,function(x) x/sum(x)) %>% as.data.frame()
colSums(meta_relab) # Should be all 1

stats = meta_relab %>% t() %>%  # switch rows and columns
  as.data.frame() %>% # Lets us use select()
  select(all_of(sig_features)) %>% 
  cor(method = 'pearson') #Pearson tests between every feature pair

# Define the color palette
color_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(40)

# Define breaks for the color scale
breaks <- seq(-1, 1, length.out = 41)  # 40 colors + 1 for the endpoint

# Create the clustered heatmap with centered color at zero
library('pheatmap')
pheatmap(stats, 
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",  
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean", 
         clustering_method = "complete",          
         color = color_palette, 
         breaks = breaks,
         main = '',
         fontsize_row = 10, 
         fontsize_col = 10,
         filename = "KEGG Heatmap.png",
         height= 9, width = 9)
```

## View Sample Similarity

```{r PCA}

hindgut1 <- hindgut %>%
  mutate(
    swim_performance_group = case_when(
      swim_performance %in% c("accelerator", "crusier sprinter") ~ "Fast",
      swim_performance %in% c("burrowing", "flow refuging", "manoeuvrer") ~ "Slow",
      swim_performance == "generalist" ~ "Moderate",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

pca = pathway_pca(abundance = metacyc_filt,
            metadata = hindgut1, 
            group = "swim_performance_group")

```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
